title: lithocarpus oblanceolatus
intro: Lithocarpus oblanceolatus, also known as the Pacific walnut or evergreen huckleberry oak, is a species of tree in the beech family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus oblanceolatus include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing the risk of heart disease, and acting as an anti-cancer agent. Lithocarpus oblanceolatus is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
